decision: Only research-backed features can enter integration planning.
Use sidecar link-first integration; iframe optional based on capability checks.
Adopt Option A cap profile for 90-day validation unless COGS breaches threshold.
Use Claude Code as primary builder and a different-model second reviewer (Gemini CLI default, Codex escalation).
Adopt token-first branding/styling system with accessibility and adaptive layout gates as implementation baseline.
Adopt 12-track market research matrix with 30/60/90-day decision gates for integration and go/no-go planning.
Completed first deep-market snapshot (pricing anchors + commercial signals) and started pricing-position validation track.
